mapper.insert: insert into room_usage_alert (room_id, alert_date, rate_percent, message) values (#{roomId}, #{alertDate}, #{rate}, #{message})
mapper.select: select id, room_id as roomId, alert_date as alertDate, rate_percent as ratePercent, message from room_usage_alert where is_read = '0' order by id desc
mapper.update: update room_usage_alert set is_read = '1' where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(*) from room_usage_alert where room_id = #{roomId} and alert_date = #{alertDate}
